languages.text: "В пределах станции зафиксирована попытка саботажа — остановки производства прометия. Ее источник — группа Альвы-9 — рукоположенные члены братства Адептус Механикус. Вероятная причина — нарушение Шестнадцати Универсальных Догм — поселившаяся в когнитивных узлах техноересь".

traits.locale_text: "Встревоженно: в пределах станции зафиксирована попытка саботажа. Источник: рукоположенные члены Братства Адептус Механикус. Вероятная причина: нарушение Шестнадцати Универсальных Догм, иначе называемое техноересью".

languages.text: "A sabotage attempt — activity directed at halting promethium production — has been detected within the confines of the station. The perpetrators are Alva-9's group — ordained members of the priesthood of the Adeptus Mechanicus. Probable cause is violation of the Sixteen Universal Laws — tech-heresy infecting their cognitive centres."
languages.original_text: "В пределах станции зафиксирована попытка саботажа — остановки производства прометия. Ее источник — группа Альвы-9 — рукоположенные члены братства Адептус Механикус. Вероятная причина — нарушение Шестнадцати Универсальных Догм — поселившаяся в когнитивных узлах техноересь".

languages.text: 「情報：駅構内にて破壊工作の試みが行われた。情報源：機械神官団の聖職者。原因：テクノヘレシーとも呼ばれる16の普遍法則の違反」
languages.original_text: "Information: a sabotage attempt has been detected within the confines of the station. Source: ordained members of the priesthood of the Adeptus Mechanicus. Probable cause: violation of the Sixteen Universal Laws, otherwise known as tech-heresy."

traits.locale_text: 「情報：駅構内にて破壊工作の試みが行われた。情報源：機械神官団の聖職者。原因：テクノヘレシーとも呼ばれる16の普遍法則の違反」

languages.text: "Bir sabotaj girişimi, prometyum üretimini durdurmaya yönelik bir hareketlilik istasyon sınırları dâhilinde tespit edildi. Gerçekleştirenler, Alva-9'un grubu. Adeptus Mechanicus rahipliğinin atanmış mensupları. Olası neden; On Altı Evrensel Yasa'nın ihlali, yani kavram merkezlerini etkileyen tekno kâfirlik."
languages.original_text: "A sabotage attempt — activity directed at halting promethium production — has been detected within the confines of the station. The perpetrators are Alva-9's group — ordained members of the priesthood of the Adeptus Mechanicus. Probable cause is violation of the Sixteen Universal Laws — tech-heresy infecting their cognitive centres."

traits.locale_text: "Bir sabotaj girişimi, prometyum üretimini durdurmaya yönelik bir hareketlilik istasyon sınırları dâhilinde tespit edildi. Gerçekleştirenler, Alva-9'un grubu. Adeptus Mechanicus rahipliğinin atanmış mensupları. Olası neden; On Altı Evrensel Yasa'nın ihlali, yani kavram merkezlerini etkileyen tekno kâfirlik."

languages.text: «Se ha detectado un intento de sabotaje en los confines de la estación, con el objetivo de interrumpir la producción de prometio. Los responsables son el grupo de Alva-9: varios miembros ordenados del sacerdocio del Adeptus Mechanicus. La causa probable es una violación de las dieciséis Leyes Universales, una tecnoherejía que infecta sus centros cognitivos».
languages.original_text: "A sabotage attempt — activity directed at halting promethium production — has been detected within the confines of the station. The perpetrators are Alva-9's group — ordained members of the priesthood of the Adeptus Mechanicus. Probable cause is violation of the Sixteen Universal Laws — tech-heresy infecting their cognitive centres."

traits.locale_text: «Se ha detectado un intento de sabotaje en los confines de la estación, con el objetivo de interrumpir la producción de prometio. Los responsables son el grupo de Alva-9: varios miembros ordenados del sacerdocio del Adeptus Mechanicus. La causa probable es una violación de las dieciséis Leyes Universales, una tecnoherejía que infecta sus centros cognitivos».

languages.text: “在本星站范围内侦测到一起破坏行为，意图停止钷素的生产。肇事者为阿尔瓦-9的团队，受祝的机械修会祭司成员。可能原因：违反十六条普适准则，其认知中枢已受到技术异端的感染。”
languages.original_text: "A sabotage attempt — activity directed at halting promethium production — has been detected within the confines of the station. The perpetrators are Alva-9's group — ordained members of the priesthood of the Adeptus Mechanicus. Probable cause is violation of the Sixteen Universal Laws — tech-heresy infecting their cognitive centres."

traits.locale_text: “在本星站范围内侦测到一起破坏行为，意图停止钷素的生产。肇事者为阿尔瓦-9的团队，受祝的机械修会祭司成员。可能原因：违反十六条普适准则，其认知中枢已受到技术异端的感染。”

languages.text: « Une tentative de sabotage... visant à perturber la production de prométhium... a été détectée dans l'enceinte de la station. Les coupables appartiennent au groupe d'Alva-9, des membres consacrés du clergé de l'Adeptus Mechanicus. La cause probable est une infraction aux seize Lois Universelles... une technohérésie affectant leurs centres cognitifs. »
languages.original_text: "A sabotage attempt — activity directed at halting promethium production — has been detected within the confines of the station. The perpetrators are Alva-9's group — ordained members of the priesthood of the Adeptus Mechanicus. Probable cause is violation of the Sixteen Universal Laws — tech-heresy infecting their cognitive centres."

traits.locale_text: « Une tentative de sabotage... visant à perturber la production de prométhium... a été détectée dans l'enceinte de la station. Les coupables appartiennent au groupe d'Alva-9, des membres consacrés du clergé de l'Adeptus Mechanicus. La cause probable est une infraction aux seize Lois Universelles... une technohérésie affectant leurs centres cognitifs. »

languages.text: "Ein Sabotageversuch — Aktivitäten mit dem Zweck, die Promethiumproduktion zu stoppen — wurde im Bereich der Station festgestellt. Die Täter gehören der Gruppe von Alva-9 an ... geweihte Mitglieder der Priesterschaft des Adeptus Mechanicus. Mögliche Ursache ist eine Verletzung der sechzehn Universalgesetze ... Tech-Ketzerei, die ihre kognitiven Zentren befallen hat."
